news.title: STAT+: Trump administration releases rules for new Medicaid work requirements
news.summary: States are racing to implement the new requirements by the start of next year.

news.title: STAT+: Eli Lilly warns hospitals to submit claims data in the next five days or lose their 340B drug discounts
news.summary: Eli Lilly has told more than 1,000 hospitals participating in the 340B drug discount program to submit claims data over the next five days — or lose price breaks.

news.title: STAT+: Global coalition to fast-track three vaccines targeting Ebola outbreak with $62 million in funding
news.summary: With no licensed vaccines available to protect against the Ebola virus currently spreading in the Congo, efforts are underway to fast-track development of at least three vaccines.

news.title: STAT+: Abivax ulcerative colitis drug shows strong efficacy, but cases of cancer raise concerns
news.summary: Abivax said its experimental treatment for ulcerative colitis showed significant efficacy in a closely watched trial, but shares of the company tanked on safety concerns.

news.title: STAT+: At ASCO, talk of barriers to cancer care, new treatments, and other big takeaways
news.summary: Here is some of what you may have missed from the world's largest cancer research meeting.

news.title: STAT+: At the world’s largest cancer research meeting, data briefly took a backseat to grief
news.summary: At the world's largest cancer research meeting, new data were plentiful. But this year, there was also a focus on grief.

news.title: As FDA misses deadline on electric shock ban, disability advocates speak out
news.summary: The FDA has missed a self-imposed deadline to ban the use of electrical shock devices in people with intellectual disabilities.

news.title: STAT+: Medicare’s mum on GLP-1s, and Massachusetts sues United
news.summary: We've been asking Medicare for weeks about the cost of giving seniors $50 obesity drugs.

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about pancreatic and lung cancer drugs, China biotech growth, and more
news.summary: Detailed study data for a pancreatic cancer treatment from Revolution Medicines confirmed it increased overall survival, from 13.2 months to 6.7 months

news.title: Opinion: What should hospitals do when patients demand unvaccinated donor blood?
news.summary: “You have to understand a person's belief if you want to address it,” Deva Sharma says on the “First Opinion Podcast” about requests for unvaccinated donor blood.

news.title: STAT+: A turning point for pancreatic cancer patients
news.summary: Eli Lilly announces two China deals, Akeso's lung cancer bispecific payoff, and more biotech news from The Readout

news.title: CDC says containing the spread of Ebola is top priority
news.summary: The Trump administration disregards infectious disease playbook, CEPI offers vaccine funding, and other health news from Morning Rounds

news.title: STAT+: Servier to buy Edgewise Therapeutics’ muscular dystrophy drug
news.summary: The French pharma firm Servier is buying an experimental muscular dystrophy drug from Edgewise Therapeutics for $1.55 billion upfront.

news.title: STAT+: No Surprises Act arbitration rule could worsen flood of provider disputes
news.summary: The arbitration process has protected patients but generated financial windfalls for some clinicians.

news.title: The hidden history of BPC-157, a favorite MAHA peptide
news.summary: A compound named “substance God help me” by its longtime champion could benefit from RFK Jr.'s favorable views on using peptides.

news.title: CMS outlines national framework to support rollout of Medicaid work requirements
news.summary: The Trump administration has finalized a rule that delineates key details for states in the nationwide rollout of work requirements in Medicaid.

news.title: CDC: 2025's uninsured rate stayed flat at 8.3%
news.summary: An annual federal survey found about 28 million uninsured individuals in 2025, up from 27.2 million in the previous year.

news.title: Patients with treatment-resistant depression are costing Medicare big
news.summary: The report found that treatment-resistant depression patients cost Medicare about $46,000 annually, with the majority of costs attributed to hospitalizations and prescription costs.

news.title: New Connecticut private equity law bans hospital sale-leasebacks
news.summary: The state law, replete with restrictions on private equity investors' role in hospital ownership and influence, is the nation's first with an explicit ban on a wealth extraction tactic associated with recent high-profile health system bankruptcies.

news.title: Trump signs off on HHS overhaul of childhood vaccine schedule with new executive order
news.summary: President Donald Trump has endorsed a decision by the Department of Health and Human Services to cut down the number of required vaccinations for children, directing federal agencies to align their policies with HHS' assessment.

news.title: Nursing associations sue to block stiffened federal student loan caps
news.summary: Ten national nursing associations have now joined 26 attorneys general in opposing the Department of Education's recently finalized restrictions on federal student loans they say will hamper the clinical workforce pipeline.

news.title: Community Health System sells 4 Arkansas hospitals to Freeman Health System for $110M
news.summary: Another CHS divestiture doubles the hospital count of Freeman Health System, a Missouri-based nonprofit.

news.title: Noom launches at-home biomarker test kit for metabolic health monitoring
news.summary: Weight loss company Noom is offering an at-home biomarker testing kit for its U.S. members, expanding its platform into diagnostics and metabolic health monitoring.

news.title: Amidst vaccine confusion, we must follow the evidence to protect against meningococcal disease
news.summary: Routine vaccination against IMD is essential to sustaining immunity during the years when young people are at greatest risk.

news.title: Enzo Health launches agentic EHR for home health agencies
news.summary: With the platform, organizations can seamlessly run all operations, including intake, scheduling, visits, quality compliance, billing and visibility for patients, the company said.

news.title: CMS grants Elevance Health a reprieve from Medicare Advantage sanctions
news.summary: Elevance Health has earned a reprieve from potential federal sanctions on its Medicare Advantage plans.

news.title: Weekly Rundown—Moffitt Cancer Center expands Reimagine Care's virtual oncology model; Tanner Health deploys AI workforce solution
news.summary: Stay up to date on the latest in health tech, digital health and health AI news with this weekly brief.

news.title: ASCO: Telix tees up pivotal test for Pluvicto challenger while eyeing ‘white space’ on radiopharma canvas
news.summary: David Cade, the chief medical officer of Melbourne-based Telix Pharmaceuticals, traveled a long way to the American Society of Clinical Oncology meeting in Chicago with a singular goal in mind: spread the word about Telix’s pivotal trial for a potential challenger to Novartis’ Pluvicto.

news.title: At ASCO 2026, a ‘paradigm shift’ for a rare gut cancer looms
news.summary: For patients with a rare cancer that arises in the gut wall, standard treatment hasn’t changed in the last 20 years. At the American Society of Clinical Oncology meeting in Chicago, GSK shared a first look at its attempt to change that.

news.title: ASCO, Ryght AI team up for breast cancer trial site selection
news.summary: The American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) and Ryght AI are teaming up to identify research sites for an ASCO clinical trial evaluating starting doses of CDK4/6 inhibitors in patients with metastatic breast cancer.

news.title: Agios signs $165M deal for blood disorder drug from Korea’s Oscotec that flunked phase 2 study
news.summary: Days after its lead clinical-stage asset suffered a setback, Agios Pharmaceuticals has rebounded by buying a blood disorder drug that flunked a phase 2 study.

news.title: Rallybio swerves past Candid pothole to land deal with cancer drug developer Avenzo
news.summary: Rallybio has steered its way to a new reverse merger, inking a deal with Avenzo Therapeutics weeks after a UCB buyout took its former partner off the market.

news.title: Servier inks $2.6B buyout of Edgewise’s muscular dystrophy unit to beef up neurology pipeline
news.summary: Servier has struck a deal to buy Edgewise Therapeutics’ muscular dystrophy business for $1.55 billion upfront, gaining control of a program that is on course to deliver pivotal data this year.

news.title: Entry Japan with Clarity, Execute with Confidence
news.summary: For biopharmaceutical companies, Japan is one of the world’s most important markets, but also among the most operationally complex. Many therapies with strong global clinical validation still face significant barriers to successful market entry, not due to scientific limitations, but because regulatory strategy, operational readiness, supply planning, and commercialization are not aligned early in the process. Although regulatory planning, business operations preparation, and supply planning are closely interconnected, they are often managed separately. This fragmented approach increases execu

news.title: Lilly locks in 5-program R&D pact with China’s Haisco worth up to $3B, but targets unclear
news.summary: Within hours of securing a gastrointestinal drug from Korea’s Hanmi Pharma, Eli Lilly has ramped up the biobucks for a wider-ranging pact with China’s Haisco Pharmaceutical.

news.title: Lilly pens $1.2B deal for Hanmi’s GLP-2 drug being aimed at short bowel syndrome
news.summary: Eli Lilly has expanded its glucagon-like peptide portfolio in an intriguing direction by licensing a phase 2-stage GLP-2 agonist from Hanmi Pharm.

news.title: ASCO: Akeso’s ivonescimab bests PD-1 inhibitor in lung cancer chemo combos, slashing death risk by 34%
news.summary: Although the first-in-class PD-1xVEGF bispecific didn’t disappoint on its overall survival headline message, detailed results from ivonescimab’s chemo-combo readout in first-line lung cancer are being picked apart.

news.title: ASCO: Revolution Medicines confident in RAS leadership as rivals square up
news.summary: This year’s meeting of the American Society of Clinical Oncology is abuzz with talk of RAS inhibitors, largely driven by Revolution Medicines’ barnburner pancreatic cancer data drop earlier this year. But even as competitors swirl, RevMed is confident that it can maintain the leadership position it has worked so hard to obtain.

news.title: ASCO: Lilly exec points to ‘nutty’ 100% response rate for in vivo CAR-T as justifying Kelonia buyout
news.summary: Kelonia Therapeutics has shared the largest slice of data yet for an in vivo CAR-T, helping to justify the $3.2 billion price tag that Eli Lilly recently paid to buy the Boston biotech.

news.title: 36氪首发｜女性健康科技企业「亿杉医疗」完成A轮及A1轮融资，并构建全球首个AI早产/分娩预测平台
news.summary: 公司正式启动B轮融资，持续推进欧洲与北美地区的产业布局与深度发展。

papers.title: RoboSemanticBench: Diagnosing Semantic Grounding in Action Prediction for VLA Models
papers.summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models are built on the premise that semantic understanding from pretrained language or vision-language backbones should guide robot action prediction. Yet robot fine-tuning is optimized as imitation over task-specific action distributions, and many evaluations can be solved through visual or instruction-action shortcuts. We introduce RoboSemanticBench (RSB), an embodied benchmark for diagnosing semantic grounding in action prediction: whether post-trained VLA models can use complex instruction semantics to select and manipulate the correct physical target. In each

papers.title: One Click per Cell Type Suffices: Training-free Group Interaction for Cell Instance Segmentation
papers.summary: Cell instance segmentation models trained on cell-specific datasets suffer severe performance drops on out-of-distribution cell types, while interactive foundation models overcome this through per-instance prompting at a cost that is prohibitively expensive for histopathology images containing hundreds to thousands of densely packed instances. We introduce Group Prompting, a new paradigm that shifts interactive segmentation from per-instance O(N) to per-type O(T), where a single click per cell type suffices to segment all instances of that type.
